property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

property.name: image
property.value: Desert Board (Original Game) map.png

property.name: description
property.value: A room with many stairwells, all of which lead to the room with the [[Shadow Mantle holder]]. They disappear upon leaving the secret room, preventing re-entry.

property.name: page
property.value: Desert Board (Original Game)#Secret Stairs

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个有众多楼梯井的房间，所有楼梯井都通往有[[暗影斗篷持有者]]的房间。离开秘密房间后楼梯消失，无法再次进入。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 秘密阶梯

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 沙漠图版 (原版游戏)#秘密阶梯

property.name: description
property.value: A cold area, initially blocked off and inaccessible on the previous [[Desert Board]].

property.name: page
property.value: Desert Board (Original Game)#Cold Area

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一寒冷区域，这里最初被封锁无法进入。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 寒冷区域

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 沙漠图版 (原版游戏)#寒冷区域

property.name: description
property.value: An infinitely looping room full of trees. Passing into this area prevents re-entry into the main map, and [[HERO_SWORD]] must continue in any direction until they find the [[Ice Key]].

property.name: page
property.value: Desert Board (Original Game)#Out of Bounds

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个充满树木的无限循环房间。进入此区域后无法返回主地图，[[HERO_SWORD]]必须向任意方向前进，直到找到[[冰之钥]]。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 边界之外

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 沙漠图版 (原版游戏)#边界之外

properties.property: An empty room, what used to be [[Tenna]]'s shop on the [[Desert Board]]. It displays text depending on the game state. * '''Has the [[Sword (Original Game)|Sword]]:''' ''BECOME STRONGER'' * '''LV 3:''' ''BECAME STRONGER'' * '''LV MAX (black text):''' ''Having fun?''

一个空房间，曾是[[沙漠图版]]上[[Tenna]]的商店。根据游戏状态显示文本。 * '''持有[[剑 (原版游戏)|剑]]：''' ''BECOME STRONGER'' * '''LV 3：''' ''BECAME STRONGER'' * '''LV MAX（黑色的文字，在游戏中需要[[HERO_SWORD]]来到文字处，让文字遮挡他，才能看到。）：''' ''Having fun?（玩的开心吗？）''

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 空房间

property.name: description
property.value: A pair of pink and yellow eyes, constituting one half of the FRIEND's face. They appear when walking towards the bottom-left tile of the room.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一对粉红和黄色的眼睛，它构成了FRIEND的半边脸。当走向房间左下角方格时出现。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: FRIEND 眼睛

property.name: description
property.value: A mouth, constituting one half of the FRIEND's face. It appears when walking toward the top-right tile of the room.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一张嘴，它构成了FRIEND的半边脸。当走向房间右上角方格时出现。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: FRIEND 嘴巴

property.name: description
property.value: Sits in the center of the room. Flies away when approached, leaving behind black text that reads "See you soon."

property.name: page
property.value: Shadow Mantle holder

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 它坐在房间中央。靠近时会飞走，留下黑色文字：“See you soon.(很快再见。)”

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 暗影斗篷持有者

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 暗影斗篷持有者

property.name: description
property.value: A Sword in what used to be the [[Desert Board#Secret Mailroom|Secret Mailroom]] on the [[Desert Board]]. Allows [[HERO_SWORD]] to kill the monsters on the board to become stronger.

property.name: page
property.value: Sword (Original Game)

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一把剑，位于Tenna修改后的[[沙漠图版]]上的[[沙漠图版#隐藏邮件室|隐藏邮件室]]。拾取到之后[[HERO_SWORD]]可以杀死图版上的怪物以变得更强，同时所有怪物都会开始攻击他。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 剑

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 剑 (原版游戏)

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest in the out-of-bounds area containing the Ice Key.

property.name: page
property.value: Ice Key

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 边界外的区域中的宝箱，内含冰之钥。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 冰之钥

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 冰之钥

property.name: description
property.value: A Blue Fish monster. Swims in the water, but lunges at [[HERO_SWORD]] when approached.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种蓝鱼怪物。在水中游动，但会在[[HERO_SWORD]]靠近时猛扑。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 蓝鱼

property.name: description
property.value: A Purple Monster. Walks around in random directions, harming [[HERO_SWORD]] when touched.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种紫色怪物。它会向随机方向走动，在拿到剑之后，触碰时会伤害[[HERO_SWORD]]。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 紫色怪物

property.name: description
property.value: A Purple Monster. Walks around in random directions, harming [[HERO_SWORD]] when touched.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种紫色怪物。它会向随机方向走动，在拿到剑之后，触碰时会伤害[[HERO_SWORD]]。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 紫色怪物

property.name: description
property.value: A Yellow Monster. Attacks by shooting red arrows at [[HERO_SWORD]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种黄色怪物。它通过向[[HERO_SWORD]]射红色箭矢攻击。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 黄色怪物

property.name: description
property.value: A stationary Flower. Attacks by shooting flashing projectiles at [[HERO_SWORD]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种静止的花。它通过向[[HERO_SWORD]]发射闪光弹攻击。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 花

property.name: description
property.value: A stationary Flower. Attacks by shooting flashing projectiles at [[HERO_SWORD]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种静止的花。它通过向[[HERO_SWORD]]发射闪光弹攻击。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 花

property.value: A stationary Flower. Attacks by shooting flashing projectiles at [[HERO_SWORD]].

property.value: 花

property.value: 花

property.name: description
property.value: A Purple Monster. Walks around in random directions, harming [[HERO_SWORD]] when touched.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种紫色怪物。它会向随机方向走动，在拿到剑之后，触碰时会伤害[[HERO_SWORD]]。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 紫色怪物

property.name: description
property.value: A Blue Bird. Flies around, landing on top of the trees, but can be forced to land on the ground by destroying them.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种蓝鸟。四处飞行，降落在树顶，但可以通过摧毁树木迫使其降落到地面。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 蓝鸟

property.name: description
property.value: A stationary Flower. Attacks by shooting flashing projectiles at [[HERO_SWORD]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种静止的花。它通过向[[HERO_SWORD]]发射闪光弹攻击。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 花

property.name: description
property.value: A Yellow Monster. Attacks by shooting red arrows at [[HERO_SWORD]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一种黄色怪物。它通过向[[HERO_SWORD]]射红色箭矢攻击。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 黄色怪物

property.value: A Yellow Monster. Attacks by shooting red arrows at [[HERO_SWORD]].
